claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Did an assault on Savanah Hernandez by Paige Ostroushko occur?
When and where did this alleged assault take place, and was it during an anti-ICE protest?
Is there video evidence of the alleged assault?
Was Paige Ostroushko arrested in connection with this alleged assault?
Have charges been filed against Paige Ostroushko for this alleged assault?
